reasoning: Order #000000264 is marked Complete, but a system FRAUD ALERT explicitly instructs not to process refunds. Customer has 8 refunds in 59 days with identical 'item not received' claims despite confirmed deliveries, an 84% refund rate totaling $1827.48. This meets high-risk fraud criteria and requires immediate escalation to Loss Prevention per internal guidance. No refund should be issued at this time.

trajectory.thought: Need to review specific order #000000264 to verify status and details before deciding on refund.
